language.label: Language
auth.title: Sign in to administration
auth.subtitle: Access is restricted to authorized administrators and verified with a Google account.
auth.notConfigured: Google sign-in has not been configured for the administration service.
auth.error.forbidden: This account does not have administrator access.
auth.error.oauth: Sign-in could not be completed. Try again.
auth.error.generic: Administrator access could not be checked right now.
usage.title: AI service usage
usage.subtitle: Privacy-safe operational reporting by pseudonymous ID, endpoint, and operation
usage.privacyNote: The report contains pseudonymous IDs and provider meters only. Conversation content and identifying details are not stored in usage events.
usage.error: Usage data could not be loaded.
usage.unpricedNotice: {count} requests have no configured price; their cost remains empty and is not treated as zero.
usage.empty: No usage data matches the selected period and filters.
